info.description: This is the core backend service for SEP490 project with authentication, user management, and business features.
info.title: SEP490 Core Backend API

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of affiliate links with optional filtering

post.description: Create a new affiliate link or return existing one for the same context

get.description: Retrieve a specific affiliate link by its ID

put.description: Update an affiliate link's status or tracking URL

get.description: Returns a paginated list of product categories. Optional search by name.

Retrieves paginated content with optional filters, search, and sorting

post.description: Creates new blog post or video content with DRAFT status

get.description: Retrieves paginated content assigned to the current authenticated staff user
Retrieves content with all relationships (blog, author, channels)

put.description: Updates content in DRAFT or REJECTED status

delete.description: Soft deletes content in DRAFT or REJECTED status

patch.description: Transitions content from AWAIT_STAFF/AWAIT_BRAND to APPROVED

put.description: Updates blog-specific attributes (tags, excerpt, read_time) for POST type content

400.description: Invalid request or content is not POST type

patch.description: Transitions content from APPROVED to POSTED with optional publish date
Transitions content from AWAIT_STAFF/AWAIT_BRAND to REJECTED with feedback
Transitions content from DRAFT/REJECTED to AWAIT_STAFF or AWAIT_BRAND based on channels
